title: Project DB, Stable Object Graph, And Test Foundation
summary: Create the Rust workspace foundation, project lifecycle CLI skeleton, SQLite migrations, stable ObjectRef/object key model, analysis_runs records, and deterministic fixture/test harness.

files.purpose: Workspace definition for RevDeck crates and shared dependency versions.
CLI entrypoint and project lifecycle command skeleton.
Domain types, ObjectRef, stable object key generation, analysis run models, shared errors.
SQLite connection, migrations, repositories, transaction boundaries.
Deterministic fixture manifest with expected hashes and object counts.
Integration test harness for project creation, migration, object ID determinism, and analysis run records.

actions: Create a Rust workspace with crates for revdeck-cli, revdeck-core, revdeck-db, revdeck-index, and revdeck-tui without implementing later feature behavior.
Define ObjectRef as the only cross-layer object identity passed between storage, commands, TUI, notes, findings, and exporters.
Implement deterministic stable object key builders for artifact, section, symbol, function, string, import, xref/edge, score, annotation, and finding references; avoid SQLite row IDs as public IDs.
Add SQLite migrations for project_meta, artifacts, analysis_runs, objects, edges, object_kind-specific tables, score_reasons, annotations, findings, finding_evidence, and schema_migrations.
Persist analysis_runs with adapter/analyzer id, version, input hash, status, started_at, finished_at, diagnostics/error_json, and recoverability.
Make importer/analyzer writes transaction-scoped and separate indexed facts from analyst-owned annotations/findings.
Add CLI skeleton for init/open/import/index/stats/report/tui with structured errors and no broad lab commands.
Create fixture manifest structure for source-controlled binaries, expected SHA-256, expected counts, and fixed timestamp handling for tests.

criteria: `rg "struct ObjectRef|enum ObjectKind" crates/revdeck-core` finds the shared identity model.
`rg "analysis_runs" crates/revdeck-db` finds migration and repository coverage.
`rg "CREATE TABLE objects|CREATE TABLE edges" crates/revdeck-db` confirms SQLite object graph tables exist.
`rg "schema_migrations" crates/revdeck-db` confirms migration tracking exists from v0.1.
`cargo test --workspace` passes with deterministic project create/reopen and stable key tests.

risks: A weak ObjectRef model will fragment navigation, annotations, findings, and export evidence.
Using row IDs as public identities will break re-index, report round trips, and future diff support.
Missing transaction boundaries can leave partially indexed facts without a trustworthy analysis_runs audit trail.
